binary_insertion.title: Binary Insertion Sort
binary_insertion.code:
BINARY INSERTION SORT:

for i = 1 to n-1
    key = arr[i]
    left = 0
    right = i - 1
    while left <= right
        mid = (left + right) // 2
        if arr[mid] > key
            right = mid - 1
        else
            left = mid + 1
    for j = i-1 down to left
        arr[j+1] = arr[j]
    arr[left] = key

Complejidad: O(n²) tiempo | O(1) espacio
binary_insertion.description: Binary insertion sort uses binary search to find the insertion position.

bitonic.title: Bitonic Sort
bitonic.code:
BITONIC SORT:

function bitonicMerge(low, cnt, dir):
    if cnt > 1
        k = cnt // 2
        for i = low to low+k-1
            if (dir == 1 and arr[i] > arr[i+k]) or (dir == 0 and arr[i] < arr[i+k])
                swap(arr[i], arr[i+k])
        bitonicMerge(low, k, dir)
        bitonicMerge(low+k, k, dir)

function bitonicSort(low, cnt, dir):
    if cnt > 1
        k = cnt // 2
        bitonicSort(low, k, 1)
        bitonicSort(low+k, k, 0)
        bitonicMerge(low, cnt, dir)

Complejidad: O(n log² n) tiempo | O(1) espacio
bitonic.description: Bitonic sort is a parallel sorting algorithm that creates bitonic sequences.

block.title: Block Sort
block.code:
BLOCK SORT:

BLOCK_SIZE = 32

for i = 0 to n step BLOCK_SIZE
    insertionSort(arr, i, min(i+BLOCK_SIZE-1, n-1))

size = BLOCK_SIZE
while size < n
    for left = 0 to n step 2*size
        mid = left + size - 1
        right = min(left + 2*size - 1, n-1)
        if mid < right
            merge(arr, left, mid, right)
    size *= 2

Complejidad: O(n log n) tiempo | O(1) espacio
block.description: Block sort is a stable sorting algorithm that sorts blocks and merges them.

bubble.title: Bubble Sort
bubble.code:
BUBBLE SORT:

for i = 0 to n-1
  for j = 0 to n-i-2
    if arr[j] > arr[j+1]
      swap(arr[j], arr[j+1])

Complejidad: O(n²) tiempo | O(1) espacio
bubble.description: Bubble sort repeatedly steps through the list, compares adjacent elements and swaps them if they are in the wrong order.

bucket.title: Bucket Sort
bucket.code:
BUCKET SORT:

minVal = min(arr)
maxVal = max(arr)
numBuckets = sqrt(n)
bucketRange = (maxVal - minVal) / numBuckets
buckets = [[] for _ in range(numBuckets)]

for value in arr
    index = floor((value - minVal) / bucketRange)
    buckets[index].append(value)

for bucket in buckets
    sort(bucket)
    result.extend(bucket)

Complejidad: O(n + k) tiempo promedio | O(n²) peor caso
bucket.description: Bucket sort distributes elements into buckets, sorts each bucket individually, then concatenates them.

burst.title: Burst Sort
burst.code:
BURST SORT:

class TrieNode:
    children = {}
    bucket = []
    isLeaf = True

function insert(node, value, depth):
    if node.isLeaf
        node.bucket.append(value)
        if len(node.bucket) > LIMIT
            node.isLeaf = False
            for val in node.bucket
                digit = getDigit(val, depth)
                if digit not in node.children
                    node.children[digit] = TrieNode()
                insert(node.children[digit], val, depth+1)
            node.bucket = None
    else
        digit = getDigit(value, depth)
        if digit not in node.children
            node.children[digit] = TrieNode()
        insert(node.children[digit], value, depth+1)

Complejidad: O(n log n) tiempo | O(n) espacio
burst.description: BurstSort is a trie-based sorting algorithm where nodes 'burst' when they become full.
